/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libquadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libquadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/drone_state__description.c.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/drone_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/drone_state__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/drone_control__description.c.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/drone_control__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/drone_control__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/trajectory_point__description.c.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/trajectory_point__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/trajectory_point__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
